title: Tasty Pungent Greek Gouda Cheese Lasagna
description: A crowd-pleasing Greek dish featuring pungent Gouda cheese, this lasagna is a paleo-friendly, cheese-pull masterpiece, with a rich and creamy mantecare-emulsified sauce. It is perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the ground beef until browned.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the tomato sauce and bring to a simmer.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, meat sauce, and Gouda cheese.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a thin layer of the meat sauce.
Arrange 4 noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the remaining meat sauce over the noodles.
Sprinkle with half of the Gouda cheese.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the meat sauce, and finally the remaining Gouda cheese.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
